Pine, Earthy, Clean Finish

Canadian Ale: Pine & Stone

ABV 5.6%

A bold Canadian ale crafted with the crisp bite of pine and the earthy depth of stone. This brew delivers a distinctive character that balances aromatic hop notes with a smooth, clean finish. Perfect for those seeking a full-flavored ale with personality and complexity in every sip.
Explore Beer

Tart Cherry, Bright, Crisp

Lakefront Linger Sour

ABV 4.8%

Lakefront Linger Sour is a refreshing craft sour ale that captures the essence of summer by the water. Brewed with tart cherry notes, this beer delivers a perfect balance of bright acidity and subtle fruit complexity. The smooth, crisp finish makes it ideal for leisurely afternoons on the porch or by the shore.
Explore Beer

Citrus Zest, Pine, Bold Hops

Wilderness Walker IPA

ABV 6.7%

Wilderness Walker IPA is a bold, hop-forward ale crafted for adventurers and IPA enthusiasts. This full-bodied brew delivers a vibrant balance of citrus and pine notes with a crisp, clean finish.
Explore Beer

Dry, Subtle Citrus, Sun-Baked

Desert Drift

ABV 5.2%

Desert Drift is a sun-soaked dry ale crafted for those who crave bold, refreshing flavor under open skies. This crisp, light-bodied brew delivers a clean finish with subtle citrus notes and a smooth, dry character.
Explore Beer

CRAFT BEER MODERN APPROACH

We make bold beers for people who appreciate clean design and quality ingredients. No pretentious tasting notes. No overcomplicated recipes. Just four beers done right.
